doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Shares of Linergy Power Sdn Bhd by TDK Subsidiary (Full Subsidiary Status)

key_facts.method: 100% stock acquisition by subsidiary Amperex Technology (Singapore) Pte. Ltd.
key_facts.reason_jp: 中型電池事業の拡大、グローバル顧客ニーズへの対応強化、TDK Transformation実現加速

summary_en: TDK's subsidiary Amperex Technology acquires 100% of Linergy Power Sdn Bhd, a Malaysian lithium-ion battery manufacturer, for $241.1 million to strengthen mid-size battery supply capacity.
summary_jp: TDK子会社がマレーシアのリチウムイオン電池メーカーLinergy Powerを241.1百万米ドルで完全子会社化。
tag_en: Acquisition · Linergy Power Sdn Bhd · 100% ownership · $241.1M · Secondary battery manufacturing
tag_jp: 買収 · Linergy Power Sdn Bhd · 100%子会社化 · $241.1M · リチウムイオン電池製造
